error.capacity_details: %d bits mamawh a nih chuan k=1-a capacity sang ber chu %d bits a ni
error.empty_coefficients: coefficient slice chu a hring thei lo
error.empty_password: password chu a khar thei lo
error.insufficient_capacity: message lian lutuk chu coefficient capacity awmsa tan a ni
error.insufficient_coefficients: embedding laiin coefficient tling lo: %d mamawh, %d a hmu
error.insufficient_header_coefficients: header embedding atana hman theih coefficient tling lo: bit 32 mamawh, %d hman theih coefficient chauh hmuh
error.invalid_code_word: code word chu a hring thei lo
error.invalid_coefficient_range: coefficient value chu a dikna (-2048 atanga 2047) atanga chhuak a ni.
error.invalid_force_k: invalid ForceK: chu 0 (auto) emaw 1-8 emaw a ni tur a ni
error.invalid_k_parameter: k parameter chu 1 leh 8 inkar a ni tur a ni
error.matrix_encode_failed: Code word: %v atan matrix encoding a hlawhchham
error.message_too_large: message size chu phal zat (8,388,607 bytes) aia tam a ni.
error.nil_random_source: random source hi nil a ni thei lo: InitializePRNG(password) hmang la, pre-seeded RandomSource pe rawh
error.permutation_failed: coefficient permutation a siam thei lo: %v

log.capacity_calculated: Coefficient capacity chhiar chhuah a ni
log.embed_complete: F5 embedding tih zawh tawh a ni
log.k_selected: Optimal k parameter thlan a ni
log.permutation_generated: Coefficient permutation hmanga siam chhuah a ni
log.shrinkage_detected: Shrinkage hmuhchhuah a ni a, re-embedding bit
